user_query: I'm organizing a workshop on genetics and nutrition for my community. Can you provide me with the lifetime disease risks for different age groups? Additionally, I need to analyze the nutritional content of common ingredients used in local recipes.

TaskList.description: Gather lifetime disease risk statistics for various age groups from reliable health databases.
Compile and analyze the nutritional content of common ingredients used in local recipes.
Prepare a presentation summarizing the lifetime disease risks and nutritional analysis for the workshop.
